title: Mad Holiday
writer: Florence Ryerson, Edgar Allan Woolf, Joseph Santley
actors: Edmund Lowe, Elissa Landi, Zasu Pitts
plot: Philip Trent is tired of playing film detective Shelby James, thinking that the stories are tripe, and plans a vacation to get away from Hollywood. But on the ship he meets a mysterious young woman, then finds a body--then discove...
